{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323150222635BF2E6C32F3F96667F"}"},"total":1099},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7306163444977435418","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看，描写的很细致，每场战斗赢得不是那种莫名其妙，一笔带过，而是有理有据，非常细节，但也有缺点就是作者太细了，短小无力[奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1701099785,"group_id":"7243278957708053504","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7Ay4I33of3nWTTMDtYTBs4=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"109640615671","user_name":"爱吃泽州饧的费迪南德"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109640615671","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1714099498,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7243278957708053504","book_info":{"abstract":"陆云一觉醒来，重生S5，成为一名职业选手，组建了属于自己的战队。
他没有系统，却获得了极限的反应和超长时间的专注度，从此成为了一名全能选手，走上了一条LPL通天代的道路。
S5世界赛，他成为LPL救世主，锐雯，剑姬，诺手，鳄鱼，船长，瑞兹，凯南，阿卡丽，15场比赛，他一共使用了15个不同的英雄，正面击败SKT，夺得冠军，成为了LPL的救世主。
S6，天有不测风云，为了队伍需要，他成为队伍的中单，妖姬，辛德拉，发条，瑞兹，龙王，维克托，吸血鬼，正面击败faker，成为了所有韩国人真正的魔王。
S7，他再度用他无以伦比的英雄池，震惊了全世界。
faker:在avenger选手面前，我感觉我的那些英雄都白练了。
厂长：天不生avenger，LPL万古如长夜。
米勒：我统计过，他的英雄海比所有职业选手加起来都还要多。
………
【顶级细节对线文】，【无敌巅峰】，【全英雄】，【只玩版本强势】，【不任性】，【纯粹】，【单女主】，【性格务实】，【冷静果断】。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ab0cf8bfde717012a308c820c6c21e7a","author":"我要成仙","author_id":"","book_id":"7243278957708053504","book_name":"LOL：出道即巅峰，全英雄绝活","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7243279011189621286","read_count":"16507","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1324848"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"603","tags":"游戏体育,重生,网游,无敌,单女主,电竞,1v1,无后宫,全能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/27e4e08dc53372f4ad276e2a17e3780a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779433342&x-signature=vAsMg%2Bj9T7G bp感觉作者对于阵容的理解非常之高，三四层楼那么高"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699073058,"group_id":"7243278957708053504","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N47C8mrh9XWVuX9AAjqf/kQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dc9b0d2ae9e3408098f14113cbba4576~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790067&x-signature=4rUlN1E0oxQTh4FExIrMvcTvzHk%3D","user_id":"597760629291752","user_name":"番番小可爱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"597760629291752","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7243278957708053504","book_info":{"abstract":"陆云一觉醒来，重生S5，成为一名职业选手，组建了属于自己的战队。
